_meta.comment: v2 adds pages[] (4-source-type long-form content from dev.to + Medium + YouTube + GitHub Discussions). algovault_blog source_type was DROPPED before C1 ship per Mr.1 Q-5 ratification 2026-05-19 (/var/www/algovault/blog absent + sitemap.xml /blog/ = 0 hits; dev.to IS canonical blog surface).

error_contract.schema_validation_failure: formatKnowledgeBundle throws Error with field-name + expected-vs-actual; HTTP 500 from the static-file consumer (bundle file would be unreadable)
error_contract.fetcher_failure: individual fetcher returns [] + WARNING log + Telegram digest mention; Promise.allSettled() in refresh-knowledge-pages.mjs guarantees partial-success bundle ships
error_contract.missing_pages_field: formatKnowledgeBundle throws 'missing required field pages' (REQUIRED in v2)

cache_contract.static_file_cache_control: depends on consumer (Caddy static-file serving; default 5-min CDN-cache-friendly)
cache_contract.in_process_cache_ttl_ms: file-watcher KnowledgeIndex polls bundle JSON on 30s interval; BM25 index rebuilds atomically on mtime change
cache_contract.refresh_cadence: Sun 06:00 UTC weekly (Hetzner cron); 2h before GEO-MEASUREMENT-W1 Mon 08:00 UTC fire so fresh content indexed before next probe
cache_contract.ttl_for_fetched_pages: n-a (no per-page TTL; whole bundle is rewritten atomically on every refresh fire)

consumers: src/lib/knowledge-index.ts::KnowledgeIndex (file-watcher; fs.watchFile 30s poll; reads bundle.pages and indexes each via wink-bm25 with source_type prefix `page_${source_type}`)
src/lib/search-engine.ts::SearchEngine (BM25 query → top-N results; surfaces page_devto / page_medium / page_youtube / page_github_discussion via _source_type field)
src/lib/chat-engine.ts::ChatEngine (uses SearchEngine output as Anthropic context-injection snippets; cites page URLs in chat_knowledge responses)
scripts/refresh-knowledge-pages.mjs (writes bundle.pages + bundle.pages_refreshed_at atomically; Sun 06:00 UTC cron entry point)
drift_check_command: curl -fsS https://api.algovault.com/knowledge/latest.json | jq -e '._algovault.bundle_version == 2 and (.pages | type) == "array"' > /dev/null && echo DRIFT_CHECK_OK || echo DRIFT_CHECK_FAIL
